name: Example — ROIs on 640×480 wizard canvas (scales to full master)
description: Pass to: vision-master.sh create-template "My template" --tools this-file.json. ROIs are wizard pixels (same as Configure UI). On run, they stretch to the program master (e.g. IMX296 1456×1088). Preview scaled ROIs: GET /api/tool-templates/{id}/for-program/{programId}.

reference_master.note: Typical register-master capture; scale factors ≈ 2.275× and 2.267×
